chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّ مِيرَاثَ أَهْلِ الْمِلَلِ بَيْنَهُمْ عَلَى كِتَابِ اللَّهِ وَ سُنَّةِ نَبِيِّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 38 – The inheritance of the people of the (other) Religions among them upon the Book of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> and the Sunnah of His<sup>azwj</sup> Prophet<sup>saww</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/216)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/216)
text: إِنَّ عَلِيّاً ( عليه السلام ) كَانَ يَقْضِي فِي الْمَوَارِيثِ فِيمَا أَدْرَكَ الْإِسْلَامَ مِنْ مَالِ مُشْرِكٍ تَرَكَهُ لَمْ يَكُنْ قُسِمَ قَبْلَ الْإِسْلَامِ أَنَّهُ كَانَ يَجْعَلُ لِلنِّسَاءِ وَ الرِّجَالِ حُظُوظَهُمْ مِنْهُ عَلَى كِتَابِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ سُنَّةِ نَبِيِّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad and a number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad and Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, altogether from Ibn Mahboub, from Ibb Raib, from Abu Hamza,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said that Ali<sup>asws</sup> had judged regarding the inheritances regarding the one who realised Al-Islam, from the wealth of the Polytheists which had been left undistributed before Al-Islam. He<sup>asws</sup> made for the women and the men, their shares, upon the Book of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic and the Sunnah of His<sup>azwj</sup> Prophet<sup>saww</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad, a number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad, and Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father all from ibn Mahbub from ibn Ri’ab from abu Hamzah who has narrated the following: “Abu Ja’far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that Ali, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, once issued a judgment. It was in the case of those who became Muslims and the legacy of pagans, which was not distributed before his becoming a Muslim. It gave men and women their shares according to the book of Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, and the Sunnah of His Holy Prophet, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause.’”
